name: phrouros
description: Phrouros — local monitoring dashboard for OpenCode and oh-my-openagent (single Bun process, read-only SQLite)
author: disaeye

scripts.prepublishOnly: bun -e "import fs from 'node:fs'; for (const p of ['bin/phrouros','public/index.html','src/server.ts']) { if (!fs.existsSync(p)) throw new Error('package incomplete: missing '+p) }" && bun run src/server.ts --help
